name: SafeBoot Configuration
categoryDescription: Core system configuration — environment variables, power settings, locale, and boot configuration.
description: Defines drivers and services that load in Safe Mode. Ransomware adds itself here to persist when AV/EDR tools don't load.
forensic_value: Ransomware families (REvil, LockBit, BlackMatter) modify SafeBoot. Unexpected services pointing to non-system binaries are critical indicators.
